calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-16-2009 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Feb-26-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Tito Torres, Esq. appeared for plaintiff San Francisco Housing Authority.
No appearance by defendant Samoa Lefiti, a/k/a Jonathan Poloai.
Default was entered against defendant on December 5, 2008.
Order waiving witness appearance at default prove-up hearing was filed on February 23, 2009.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff San Francisco Housing Authority, and against the Defaulted Defendant Samoa Lefiti, a/k/a Jonathan Poloai, as follows:

Defendant Samoa Lefiti, a/k/a Jonathan Poloai, is enjoined and restrained from being within 150 yards of any and all San Francisco Housing Authority property, and is therefore Ordered to stay away at least 150 yards from any and all San Francisco Housing Authority property, perpetually pursuant to Californis Code of Civil Procedure Section 526.

Judgment for Injunctive Relief to Abate a Public Nuisance was submitted to and signed by the Court.

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Feb-24-2009 Continued To Feb-26-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 218

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-30-2008 Continued To Mar-27-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212
